entities.name: Target Enrichment Long-probe Quantitative Amplified Signal assays
Division of Clinical Trials and Biostatistics Mayo Clinic
Division of Gastroenterology and Hepatology Mayo Clinic
Division of Experimental Pathology Mayo Clinic
Plasma assay of methylated DNA markers detects recurrent metastatic breast cancer

evidence_entities.text: Up to 30% of women with no evidence of disease after curative intent breast cancer treatment will relapse and succumb to metastatic disease
Liquid biopsy of circulating tumor DNA (ctDNA) has been shown to identify patients with relapse prior to imaging
Among the 16 MDMs, ten had single-marker areas under the curve (AUCs) above 0.90, with the highest at 0.96
three protein markers (CA153, CEA, CA125) performed with an AUC of 0.86, 0.84, and 0.75, respectively
A random forest (RF) model using all 16 MDMs discriminated MBC from Benign controls with an overall AUC of 0.97
